evidence.source_title: Albania cuts diplomatic ties with Iran over cyberattack
evidence.description: Albania cited the July 2022 HomeLand Justice cyberattack directly as the reason for severing diplomatic relations with Iran on 6 September 2022 — the severance was a direct consequence of the cyberattack.

editorial_notes: The cyberattack directly caused the diplomatic severance. The severance event description references it explicitly.
